description_long: This is a modern, French-door refrigerator with a sleek, matte black finish. The front features two vertical doors on the upper section, with a water and ice dispenser integrated into the left door, and two horizontal pull-out freezer drawers below. The handles are long, vertical, and slightly protruding, matching the refrigerator's minimalist aesthetic. The rear side displays a vented panel with a fan grille and two circular access covers, likely for maintenance and cooling. The overall design is boxy and robust, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or garages, with no visible brand logo or digital control panel.
description: A matte black French-door refrigerator with a water/ice dispenser, two freezer drawers, and a vented rear panel. The design is modern and robust, with long vertical handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors, a water/ice dispenser on the left, and two lower freezer drawers with vertical handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a flat, featureless matte black panel.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a vented panel with a fan grille, two circular covers, and a barcode, all set in a matte black finish.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain, flat matte black surface with no distinguishing features.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, vertical, slightly protruding handles mounted on the front doors and drawers.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular vent panel with a mesh grille and circular covers located on the lower rear side.
